tasks.description: Review the newly created `tests/verify_iso_size.sh` script and the ISO validation step in `.github/workflows/build-iso.yml`. Replace repeated external subprocess calls (like `grep`, `awk`) with native bash logic or substring matching wherever possible to eliminate fork/exec overhead.

Ensure any error messages emitted by `tests/verify_iso_size.sh` and the ISO validation step in `.github/workflows/build-iso.yml` are clearly formatted as multi-line outputs with an actionable '💡 How to fix:' block to reduce developer cognitive load on failure.

Audit all systemd `.service` files under `airootfs/etc/systemd/system/` and implement strict systemd service sandboxing (e.g., `ProtectSystem=strict`, `NoNewPrivileges=yes`, `PrivateTmp=yes`) to limit privileges, prioritizing the `neos-autoupdate`, `neos-driver-manager`, and `neos-liveuser-setup` services.
